text_raw: Out here, the law of the sands rules all!

text_raw: We are the storm's survivors... and you think you can stand against us?

text_raw: We took this land by our own strength. Why meddle in what's rightfully ours?

text_raw: If you intend to fight, be prepared to pay the price!

text_raw: So, even here there's one who loves to meddle in others' affairs!
